identity.name: FireEye
identity.mission: Proteger a floresta portuguesa através de tecnologia de ponta, inteligência artificial e vigilância autónoma.

buttons.primary: bg-primary-main hover:bg-primary-light text-white font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,69,0,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,69,0,0.5)] border border-transparent hover:border-white/20
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-primary-main text-white hover:text-primary-main font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/5

cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary-main transition-colors w-full

motion.instructions: Use framer-motion for all scroll animations. Use 'whileInView' with 'once: true' for performance.

visual_enhancers.particles: Use tsparticles with 'ember' preset (orange particles floating up, fading out) for Hero section.
visual_enhancers.parallax: Use slightly different scroll speeds for background layers vs content.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use absolute positioned divs with large blur (blur-3xl) and low opacity (opacity-20) behind key elements to create ambient light.

hero.layout: Full height (min-h-screen), content centered vertically but left-aligned text.
hero.visuals: Dark overlay gradient on hero_bg image. Floating ember particles. Large animated text.

features_steps.title: Como Funciona o Sistema
features_steps.style: Vertical timeline or horizontal stepper with animated icons. Steps: 1. Monitorização Térmica, 2. Deteção AI, 3. Verificação Drone, 4. Alerta Imediato.

impact_stats.style: Bento grid with large numbers (text-6xl) in gradient text (Fire Orange). Cards with glassmorphism.

partners.style: Monochrome logos in a marquee (react-fast-marquee) with low opacity (opacity-50), hover to full color.

team.style: Grid of profile cards. Use 'team_working' as a section background or specific member photos if available (use placeholders if not).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react react-fast-marquee @tsparticles/react @tsparticles/slim clsx tailwind-merge
SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (primary, secondary, background-paper) and fonts.
FONTS: Add Outfit and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts via import in index.css.
COMPONENT LIBRARY: Create a reusable 'Section' component that handles the max-width and padding.
NAVIGATION: Create a sticky navbar with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/50).
IMAGES: Use the provided URLs. For the 'thermal_tech' image, apply a CSS filter (hue-rotate) if needed to match the orange theme, or use as is for realism.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text readability issues. Ensure contrast > 4.5:1.
Do NOT center align long text blocks. Left align for readability.
Use 'gap-8' minimum for separating major elements.
Interactive elements must have a distinct hover state.
Theme is STRICTLY DARK MODE. Do not implement a light toggle unless requested (not requested here).
